settings.h01: Hand-Crafted From Scratch, Just For You!
settings.p01:
Whether you want a single door, a two-door entry, or a sauna that will fit the entire room, we can build almost anything you want. Just tell us what you're looking for, and we will build it for you.

Building a custom sauna is a very easy process. All you have to do is click on the Buy Now button (to the left), put down a 50% deposit, and we will work with you to create your dream sauna.

Medical Sauna™ makes some of the best saunas in the world. We understand that some customers want the finest things in life. They desire a Medical Sauna™ that is unmatched in luxury, utility, efficiency, and personalization. With this in mind, we now offer Medical Sauna's Custom-Made, Hand-Crafted Saunas from scratch. Whether you are looking for a traditional sauna, infrared sauna, or combination sauna, we can help you create your dream Medical Sauna™.

Call us today to place your order. One of our technicians will take down the measurements needed to create your sauna. They’ll help you determine the best style, shape, and heater that fits your needs. What’s more, we have several models that are perfect starting points for most people. We will help you throughout the customization process and hold your hand through every step of the process. Because everything is made from scratch, it does take two months. However, we are sure you'll love your Hand-Built, Custom Medical Sauna.

settings.heading: Customize Your Own Medical Sauna™
settings.paragraph_text: Custom-built, hand-assembled, and engineered with medical precision-designed around your space, goals, and lifestyle.

settings.subfdesc: From layout and dimensions to materials and heat style—every detail is fully customizable to match your space, needs, and vision.

settings.heading_sec: Your Medical Sauna, Made Your Way
settings.desc_sec: Get the sauna that fits your space and routine, engineered with the medical-grade technology and lasting quality behind every Medical Sauna.

settings.product_disc: Beautifully integrated saunas tailored to fit your home and daily wellness routine.
Weather-resistant saunas for peaceful backyard escapes or outdoor retreats.
Durable, high-capacity saunas built for gyms, spas, clinics, and wellness spaces.
Fully customizable layouts with infrared, steam, or hybrid heating—built your way.

settings.desc_sec: Browse the range of custom Medical Sauna builds we can create for you.

settings.heading_sec: A Look at Our Custom Builds
A Look at Our Custom Builds

settings.howitwork_desc: Schedule a call with one of our sauna specialists to discuss your space, goals, and vision for your custom build.
We’ll create a detailed custom design based on your preferences, layout, and heating style—refining every detail until it’s right.
Once your design is finalized, our team hand-builds your sauna using premium materials and medical-grade technology.
Your sauna is delivered and professionally installed for a smooth, ready-to-use experience—right in your home or outdoor space.
